steps.title: Identify what destroyed evidence prevents
steps.content: The passage explains that evidence was deliberately destroyed, so we're unlikely to have ______ account of her reign. What type of account becomes impossible when crucial information is lost? One that's complete and comprehensive.

steps.title: Apply the correct meaning
steps.content:
Exhaustive means complete and thorough—exactly what destroyed evidence prevents us from having.

A record missing key information cannot be exhaustive. The other three choices address unrelated qualities: imaginative refers to creativity, superficial to analytical depth, and questionable to reliability.

That matches Choice C — an exhaustive.
